ns15:LsdList.ns7:description: Goods not concerned by labelling requirements on fluorinated greenhouse gases as referred to Article 12, paragraph 1 of Regulation (EU) No 517/2014
Goods other than those falling under the import prohibitions defined in Article 11.1 of Regulation (EU) N° 517/2014
Goods other than pre-charged equipment with hydrofluorocarbons, as defined in article 14.1 of Regulation (EU) No 517/2014
Export authorisation - Vaccines against SARS-related coronaviruses (SARS-CoV species) and active substances, including master and working cell banks used for the manufacture of such vaccines
Goods not released for free circulation in Bulgaria, Hungary, Poland, Romania or Slovakia
Goods not concerned by labelling requirements on fluorinated greenhouse gases as referred to Article 12, paragraph 1 of Regulation (EU) No 517/2014
Goods other than those falling under the import prohibitions defined in Article 11.1 of Regulation (EU) N° 517/2014
Goods other than pre-charged equipment with hydrofluorocarbons, as defined in article 14.1 of Regulation (EU) No 517/2014
Goods not concerned by labelling requirements on fluorinated greenhouse gases as referred to Article 12, paragraph 1 of Regulation (EU) No 517/2014
Goods other than those falling under the import prohibitions defined in Article 11.1 of Regulation (EU) N° 517/2014
Goods other than pre-charged equipment with hydrofluorocarbons, as defined in article 14.1 of Regulation (EU) No 517/2014
